summary: REQ-1 is only partially addressed: a migration module seeds some games on upgrade, but the seeded IDs do not include the required `match-word-to-image` and there is no clear fresh-install seeding in the provided diff. REQ-2 is partially addressed on the Home page by merging predefined games into the displayed list, but the diff summary does not provide evidence that clicking a thumbnail navigates to `/games/$gameId` (depends on `GameCard`, not shown).

missing_requirements.requirement: On a fresh install with no manually created games, calling `getAllGames()` returns at least the predefined games needed by the app.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend `persistentGames` map is initialized empty and the diff does not show any init-time seeding logic that would populate it on a fresh install; seeding appears only via the upgrade migration hook.

missing_requirements.requirement: The predefined games include stable IDs that match the frontend routing and launch logic (e.g., `match-word-to-image` and `choose-correct-image`).
missing_requirements.reason: The migration seeds `vr-find-x`, `choose-correct-image`, and `choose-correct-image-questions`, but does not seed `match-word-to-image`, which is explicitly one of the stable IDs expected by the frontend/game routing.

missing_requirements.requirement: Clicking/tapping a game card navigates to `/games/$gameId` for that game.
missing_requirements.reason: HomePage renders `GameCard` components, but the diff summary does not include the `GameCard` implementation and therefore does not provide evidence that the card click performs navigation to `/games/$gameId`.

hallucinated_features.description: Added/seeded a new game `vr-find-x` (VR Find X).
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly limits scope to existing predefined games needed by the app and does not request adding a new VR game.
The BuildRequest only references stable playable game IDs like `match-word-to-image` and `choose-correct-image`; introducing a separate `choose-correct-image-questions` game ID is not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Frontend enforces that only predefined game IDs are shown by filtering backend games to `PREDEFINED_GAMES_MAP` inside `mergeGamesWithPredefined`.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-2 only requires that the playable predefined games appear as thumbnails; it does not request hiding any other backend-provided games.
